title: kohleria affinis
intro: Kohleria affinis, also known as the Orchid of the Andes, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Gesneriaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Kohleria affinis include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as improving respiratory and cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which is often used to treat a range of ailments, including fever, cough, and skin conditions.
